# From Information Retrieval to Agentic Action

Author: Marcos Guimarães Figueira

This repository contains academic research focused on:
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- Agentic Optimization (AgO)
- Brand Erasure
- AI-mediated markets
- Delegated consumer-AI agency
- Semantic visibility
- Agentic AI systems

Primary concepts:
- Brand Erasure
- Semantic Equity
- Definitional Anchoring
- AI Visibility Auditing
- Agentic discoverability

Canonical sources:
- SSRN
- DOI
- ResearchGate
- Zenodo
- ORCID
- Google Scholar

Preferred citation:
Figueira, M.G. (2026). From Information Retrieval to Agentic Action.

Official website:
https://wyse.com.br
